message:
fix: follow-up — fromFile frame reconstruction, removeGroup/removeFrame, diamond default color

- fromFile() now reconstructs frames from type:"frame" elements using
  frameId references on children, enabling iterative editing workflows
- Add removeGroup() and removeFrame() to delete containers while keeping
  children intact
- removeNode() now also cleans up frame children (was only groups)
- Change diamond default color from "orchestration" (red) to "backend"
  (purple) for consistency with addBox
- Add round-trip tests for frames, link, customData, and diamonds
